ranking.description: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.
ranking.description_ja: Agent skills for Obsidian. Teach your agent to use Markdown, Bases, JSON Canvas, and use the CLI.
ranking.readme_summary: Agent Skills for use with Obsidian. These skills follow the Agent Skills specification so they can be used by any skills-compatible agent, including Claude Code and Codex CLI. Installation Marketplace npx skills Manually Claude Code Add the contents of this repo to a /.claude folder in the root of your Obsidian vault (or whichever folder you're using with Claude Code)
ranking.readme_summary_ja: Agent Skills for use with Obsidian. These skills follow the Agent Skills specification so they can be used by any skills-compatible agent, including Claude Code and Codex CLI. Installation Marketplace npx skills Manually Claude Code Add the contents of this repo to a /.claude folder in the root of your Obsidian vault (or whichever folder you're using with Claude Code)
